creator: vsjcfm@gmail.com
text:
When I configuring boot-time attaching of geli device, i *must* write device name to loader.conf, e.g. geli_da0_keyfile0_load="YES".
I prefer GEOM labels, but I cannot write to loader.conf something like geli_gpt/gptlabel_keyfile0_load nor geli_gptlabel_keyfile0_load.

How-To-Repeat: Set up GELI on any disk with any parameters, and try to attach it via GEOM label in loader.conf.
